title: Chennai, Tamil Nadu — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Chennai, Tamil Nadu: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.

Overview

Chennai is a city in Tamil Nadu with a population of 10,970,000. A major cultural and economic center in South India, known for its Marina Beach, classical music scene, and thriving automobile industry.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
